user_id.description: The 7shifts ID of the user who is clocking in.

editable_punch.description: If true the time punch can be edited by a manager. Set to false via POS integrations

department_id.description: Department ID. Defaults to 0 if not defined.

hourly_wage.description: Calculated hourly wage. Use the users_wages endpoint value for accuracy

approved.description: If true the time punch is approved

clocked_in.description: The start date and time when the user clocked in. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

clocked_out.description: The start date and time when the user clocked out. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

auto_clocked_out.description: If true the time punch was auto clocked out

clocked_in_offline.description: If true the time punch was clocked in offline

clocked_out_offline.description: If true the time punch was clocked out offline

tips.description: Tips declared for the shift in cents

pos_type.description: The source of the time punch. 7shift apps will be web

created.description: The date and time when created. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

modified.description: The date and time when last modified. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

deleted.description: If true the time punch is deleted
